title: After the Arima Kinen: A Relay for the Ages ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Bring it home, sis!" After their runaway dash,
Daitaku Helios cheers her on as Mejiro Palmer
begins her second acceleration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wins the Arima Kinen and the crowd starts
chanting her name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer, the black sheep of the Mejiro
family, has left her mark in history as the
magnificent runaway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the winner's interview, she goes full party mode
and then shows everyone her most impressive
runaway yet.
